name: knit-natter-social-club
description: Local Knit & Natter social club: attend Milford seed, discover groups, or start a suburb club

steps.text: Skill knit-natter-social-club. Seed: 2nd & 4th Tue 5–7pm Nirvana 95 Kitchener Rd Milford, $10 incl drink (VERIFY LIVE wildandwoollyyarns.co.nz). Not a booking agent. Discover Meetup / guilds / Knit World. calendar-mail-meetings for invites.

steps.prompt: Using skill knit-natter-social-club and knowledge/social/knit-natter-auckland.md, produce knit-plan: (1) verdict attend vs discover vs start-club (2) if Auckland/Milford: attend-milford with 2nd/4th Tuesday 5–7pm, Nirvana 95 Kitchener Rd, $10 incl drink, VERIFY LIVE listing (3) discover-groups: Meetup knitting Auckland, Handweavers & Spinners Guild, Knit World knit & chat, libraries (4) if founding: start-club 30-day launch + venue checklist (5) schedule-natter calendar notes for 2nd/4th Tuesday pattern (6) welcome-hygiene (7) OPEN prices/venues change. Do not invent host phones or sold-out status.
